author: pietroGru
body:
#### PR description:
The PR addresses the crash reported in [cmssw/issues/50587](https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/issues/50587).

Some protection is introduced in the SoA to legacy cluster coversion, preventing the insertion of entries in the detset vector collection from the same module. This is supposed not to occur but corrupted FED data can trigger the problem.


#### PR validation:
Tested on the [reproducer](https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/issues/50587#issue-4169541880) on run 402512 with no crashes.

**edit**
I moved to draft because I believe this problem should be fixed in the production of the SoA rather than in the conversion.
title: Protection for DetSetVector::inserv exception in sistrip::SiStripClustersToLegacy
